known_issues: For Her page: sliding product category circles not syncing uploaded images from admin panel — shows icons instead
For Her page: body background color is off-white instead of matching other pages

existing_features.title: Fix the sliding product category circles on the For Her page (GirlsHomePage) so that when an image is uploaded via the admin panel (HeaderCategoryNavManagement), the circle displays the uploaded image instead of falling back to the emoji/icon. The component should fetch category header data from the backend (same pattern as BoysHomePage uses for boys headers) and render the uploaded image when available, showing the icon only as a true fallback when no image has been uploaded.

Fix the body background color of the For Her page (GirlsHomePage) to match the background color used on all other customer-facing pages. Only the page body background should be changed — the header and footer styling must remain unaffected.
